questions.text: You are preparing for CompTIA Server+ and reviewing Server Hardware and Virtualization. Which source aligns with official CompTIA exam objectives and study resources?
questions.explanation: Use Server+ Exam Objectives and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: Operations reports a need to choose RAID level for performance and redundancy. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution?

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to plan rack power and cooling. Which approach is MOST reliable?

options.text: Redundant PSUs and adequate BTU capacity

questions.text: A company needs to virtualize physical servers. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: During troubleshooting, you must virtualize physical servers.

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: A company needs to harden default services. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must apply firmware updates safely. What should they do FIRST?
What should you do FIRST to harden default services?

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: Which option is MOST appropriate to harden default services?

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: What should you do FIRST to apply firmware updates safely?
Which option is MOST appropriate to apply firmware updates safely?
A technician must apply firmware updates safely. What is the best choice?
For compliance, the team must harden default services.

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: Per CompTIA best practices, you should apply firmware updates safely.
During troubleshooting, you must harden default services.

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: On the job, you need to apply firmware updates safely.

Two designs were proposed. Design A would harden default services. Design B would apply firmware updates safely. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.explanation: Hardening shrinks attack surface. Compare with Vendor advisories and staged rollout: Firmware fixes hardware-level issues.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would apply firmware updates safely. Design B would harden default services. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.explanation: Firmware fixes hardware-level issues. Compare with Disable unused roles and close ports: Hardening shrinks attack surface.

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: Which option is MOST appropriate to apply firmware updates safely (variant 1)?
